definition:
Someone descended from Hori who was aomeone descended from Hori, a man living at the time of the Patriarchs, first mentioned at Gen.36.22; 
 son of: Lotan (H3877); 
 brother of: Hemam (H1950)
Group of cho.ri (חֹרִי "Hori" H2753H) 
 § Horite = "cave dweller"
1) the inhabitants of Mount Seir
2) the inhabitants of Edom (in later times)
